title: guarea rusbyi
intro: Guarea rusbyi, also known as Rusby's guarea or Rusby's guarea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is a deciduous tree native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, valued for its medicinal properties and versatile uses. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Guarea rusbyi can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
